user.title: Configure Homebridge Monitor
user.description: Enter the host (IP address or hostname), port and credentials of your Homebridge instance.

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of the Homebridge instance (e.g. 192.168.1.100)
data_description.port: TCP port on which the Homebridge web UI is listening (default: 8581)
data_description.username: Username used to log in to the Homebridge web UI
data_description.password: Password used to log in to the Homebridge web UI

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Homebridge Monitor
reauth_confirm.description: Enter the credentials for your Homebridge instance at {host}:{port}.

data_description.username: Username used to log in to the Homebridge web UI
data_description.password: Password used to log in to the Homebridge web UI

abort.already_configured: This Homebridge instance is already configured.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Homebridge. Verify the host and port and try again.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid username or password. Verify your credentials and try again.

init.title: Homebridge Monitor options
init.description: Modify the host, port, credentials or polling interval for this Homebridge instance.

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of the Homebridge instance (e.g. 192.168.1.100)
data_description.port: TCP port on which the Homebridge web UI is listening (default: 8581)
data_description.username: Username used to log in to the Homebridge web UI
data_description.password: Password used to log in to the Homebridge web UI
data_description.scan_interval: How often (in seconds) Home Assistant will check if Homebridge is reachable (5 – 3600)

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Homebridge. Verify the host and port and try again.
error.already_configured: This Homebridge instance is already configured.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid username or password. Verify your credentials and try again.

reauthenticate.name: Reauthenticate
reauthenticate.description: Forces a token refresh when the current JWT is still valid, or a full re-authentication when it has expired or is absent.

update_plugins.name: Update Plugins
update_plugins.description: Triggers updates for the specified plugins (or all plugins with a pending update if no list is provided) on all configured Homebridge instances.

plugins.name: Plugins
plugins.description: Optional list of plugin names to update (e.g. homebridge-eveatmo). When omitted, every plugin that currently has a pending update is updated.

update_homebridge_core.name: Update Homebridge Core
update_homebridge_core.description: Triggers an update of the Homebridge core package on all configured Homebridge instances.

update_homebridge_ui.name: Update Homebridge UI
update_homebridge_ui.description: Triggers an update of the Homebridge Config UI X package on all configured Homebridge instances.
